## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run verify` passes locally (drift + conformance + build + typecheck + lint + tests)
- [ ] Behavior changes have matching `dna/` spec/fixture updates (with `tier` and `provenance`)
- [ ] A changeset is included if a published package changed (`pnpm changeset`)
